long_description:
The baremetal health check node tor2-qz1-sr1-rk161-s08 failed on smartnic upgrade, it's in an unknown state. 

Please reach out to Beth Chen when ready to further investigate.
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Recover tor2-qz1-sr1-rk161-s08
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: Powered on the node along with following of shutdown and poweron. The node came back up responding and is up to date with version so no smartnic recovery was required.
Signature of Issue: The baremetal health check node tor2-qz1-sr1-rk161-s08 failed on smartnic upgrade, it's in an unknown state. 
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: 
Category/Subcategory: is-bare-metal-server 	Hardware 	SmartNIC
Timeline Summary: 
Resolution Runbook: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/bare_metal_server_network_elba_recovery.html#reconfigure-smartnic-device
